artPrompt: A widescreen noir film-still of a sweating debtor pinned in a rain-slick alley as two looming goblin enforcers flank him in silhouette, one extending an open expectant palm into a pool of warm amber lamplight, the other half-lost in cigar haze; drizzle streaks the brick, ink-black shadows closing in from all sides, the choice grimly reasonable, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Pay Up or Else
text: Target opponent loses 2 life unless that player pays {2} or sacrifices a Treasure. Their choice. The Don is reasonable. The Don is always reasonable.
flavorText: "Or else what?" they asked. The goblins exchanged a look. There was no need to specify.
